use_cases: Provides contextual information on hover without cluttering the UI
Displays helpful hints for icons and buttons with limited space
Offers non-intrusive guidance for new users learning an interface
Reveals additional details for dense data tables and forms
Delivers accessibility-friendly descriptive labels for interactive elements
ai_summary: A rounded tooltip component built with shadcnspace styling conventions, using Radix UI primitives for accessibility and proper ARIA support. Features smooth hover-triggered display with rounded corners for a modern, friendly appearance. Designed to provide contextual information without disrupting user workflow, commonly used for icon buttons, form field hints, and data-dense interfaces.
